title: Who won Oscars for 2026? See the full winners list here
text: Paul Thomas Anderson won Best Director for "One Battle After Another," marking his first-ever Oscar win in this category. The film, distributed by Warner Bros., represented a significant achievement for the acclaimed filmmaker. "One Battle After Another" secured the top prize, arriving with 13 nominations and taking home several major awards. "Sinners" made history with 16 nominations—the most ever—and won Best Actor (Michael B. Jordan) and Best Cinematography, with Autumn Durald Arkapaw becoming "the first woman to win that award." Best Casting became the Academy Awards' inaugural category addition in 25 years, with Cassandra Kulukundis winning for "One Battle After Another." Host Conan O'Brien returned to host at the Dolby Theatre for his second consecutive year. "All the Empty Rooms," documenting spaces of children killed in school shootings, won Best Documentary Short. Best Actress: Jessie Buckley won for "Hamnet."
